tasks.title: Document optimistic engagement-state contract once backend mutations exist
tasks.description: frontend/docs/architecture.md notes the like button is client-side only and diverges from the backend API contract's authoritative engagement state target. Once /api/v1 like/reaction mutations exist, update frontend/docs/api-integration.md and backend/docs/api-contract.md to document the mutation shape, idempotency key requirement, and the client reconciliation flow (optimistic -> confirmed/rollback).

tasks.title: Document engagement metrics strategy in an Explanation page
tasks.description: Session discussion proposed collecting viewport dwell time, visibility fraction, See-more expand clicks, and source-link clicks as recommendation-engine input signals, plus quality guards (tab focus, idle detection, content-length normalisation). Capture this rationale and metric taxonomy in docs/explanation/ before backend implementation begins.
tasks.context: Decision discussed in session; no code exists yet.
